We are currently suggesting the owner of LIHKG to open an English subpage so that foreigners can have a better understanding about Hong Kong’s situation.

Hopefully it could be done but please understand that the workload of the admin team of this website is already very heavy as they are facing more and more frequent cyber attacks from China recently, so it may take some time.

Please feel free to ask questions on twitter or reddit in the mean time. We Hong Kongers will do our best to answer them.

Once again, thanks for standing with Hong Kong

Hi there, you should know that this place is already swarming with journalists and most of them are bilingual, so there is no issue with messages getting out.

For journalists who don't understand Chinese and Cantonese, they are usually on an English Telegram channel or have colleagues who help them translate important messages.

Journalista are very resourceful, no need to worry about them.

Fight for freedom!
Stand with Hong Kong!!

If you are capable in summarizing short briefs of everyday news in hong kong, download twitter right away and start writing.

if there is an English channel on lihkg, i promise to produce at least one piece of translation per day.

should organize a tg group for translation.

There are two main channels for English promotional materials and news update now.



https://t.me/hkstandstrong_promo_int
https://t.me/guardiansofhongkong

HKGETV has some high quality videos on YouTube with English subs:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCtzu8W55-S9biNCKgHg1v7w

There are also quite a few well established English Facebook pages, such as BeWater HK.

I understand that this is a "leaderless" movement, but translation and promotion really need a certain level of coordination. It'll be great if LIHKGers could zero in on promoting these channels to our English-speaking friends.

quote.msg: From the prospective of protestors, do you think that fake news that are in favour of protestors should be encouraged?

replies.msg:
It is such an unfortunate to see there are many fake news happen on both sides.

We need to be cautious. This is a new kind of Chinazi propaganda. This is a new differentiation mean by used by CPC to hurt people's analytical ability and unable to trust any source of news.

However, Hong Kong is in a critical moment of life and death. Facing the totalitarianism of Hong Kong and CPC gov, the top priority is fighting for democracy and human right in every possible means continuously.

The true peace will come when the government has an improved system that enables true democracy and able to respect and safeguard people's human right and freedom.
